programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que está desfigurando víctimas a propósito. Además, Rossi tiene un encuentro incómodo con su exesposa, Hayden Montgomery, quien mantuvo a su hija, Joy, en secreto durante casi 30 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los guardias de la prisión en Virginia interceptan un paquete de pruebas relacionadas con el secuestro de dos niños hace varios años, la UAC interroga a un famoso asesino serial que puede tener información sobre el paradero de los niños.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se sorprende cuando Hotch es arrestado por un equipo SWAT y por sospecha de conspiración, mientras el equipo se apresura a demostrar su inocencia, sospechan que se avecina un complot mayor.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers try to calm an agitated and disoriented man before he hurts himself or someone else, and a driver going 2 MPH on a highway catches the attention of a patrol car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En el estreno de la novena temporada, el equipo de CSI se une después de que Warrick recibe un disparo en un callejón de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una hipnotizadora que usa sus poderes de persuasión para robar bancos se convierte en la principal sospechosa en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una serie de víctimas fallecidas en medio de sus actividades cotidianas, el equipo de CSI debe determinar qué es lo que hace que permanezcan de pie después de la muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante el curso de una investigación, los CSI descubren que su víctima, una joven que fue asesinada y encontrada con varios tipos de sangre diferentes en su organismo, es hija de un criminal buscado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un caso relacionado con el mundo de la dominación, Grissom visita a Lady Heather para encontrar algunas respuestas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de que ocurre un tiroteo que involucra a un niño justo en el medio de Koreatown, ninguno de los testigos hablará con el equipo de CSI que investiga el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso de un caso de asesinato ocurrido hace 12 años pasa al primer plano de una nueva investigación del CSI.

programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: La dulce vida
programme.desc: Poppy es una maestra de escuela del norte de Londres, que con su optimismo, supera los pequeños dramas de la vida y contagia de alegría a quienes la rodean.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Temple de acero
programme.desc: Una obstinada joven (Kim Darby) contrata al cascarrabias Rooster para buscar al hombre que asesinó a su padre y huyó con los ahorros familiares.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: El silencio de los inocentes
programme.desc: Un psicópata llamado Buffalo Bill está asesinando mujeres, por lo que el FBI envía a la agente Clarice Starling a entrevistar a un prisionero demente: el Dr. Hannibal Lecter, un psiquiatra caníbal que tiene una fascinación por asesinar.

programme.title: Amenaza virtual
programme.desc: En este emocionante y trepidante thriller, el genio de la informática Milo Hoffman (Ryan Phillippe) consigue el trabajo de sus sueños solo para descubrir que el director ejecutivo (Tim Robbins) puede emplear prácticas comerciales muy poco ortodoxas.

programme.title: Crímenes ocultos
programme.desc: Un miembro de la policía militar investiga una serie de asesinatos infantiles que ocurren durante la era de Stalin en la Unión Soviética.

programme.title: Atraco 88
programme.desc: Una mente criminal decide hacer un último trabajo antes de ir a la cárcel y recluta a un grupo de jóvenes empleados del banco para robar 80 millones de dólares en un asalto audaz y descarado al sistema bancario estadounidense. Inspirado por hechos reales.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: En lo más profundo
programme.desc: El oficial, Cole, tiene la misión de infiltrarse en el sindicato de Dios, un brutal jefe criminal. Pero a medida que Cole se involucra en el grupo de Dios, la línea que separa su verdadera identidad de su personalidad callejera comienza a desaparecer.

programme.title: Anomalisa (ESP)
programme.desc: En un viaje a Ohio, Michael se separa de la rutina de su vida cotidiana y un encuentro casual le ayuda a darse cuenta de lo que le ha estado faltando. Amor, risa y soledad forman parte de la aclamada obra de arte de Charlie Kaufman y Duke Johnson.

programme.title: Abajo en el delta
programme.desc: En el debut como directora de Maya Angelou, una afligida madre soltera pasa un verano en la casa familiar de campo en Misisipi, y aprende a revertir el rumbo de su vida en una historia inspiradora sobre la familia, la comunidad y la amistad.

programme.title: Mente indomable
programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Pena de muerte
programme.desc: Ganadora del Oscar, Susan Sarandon interpreta a la hermana Helen Prejean. Una mujer espiritual quien se embarca en la peligrosa misión de salvar a un joven condenado a la pena de muerte.

programme.title: El tren de la muerte
programme.desc: Jon Voight y Eric Roberts interpretan a un par de presos que en su fuga suben a un tren de mercancías, pero cuando el maquinista muere de un ataque al corazón, se encuentran atrapados, solos y a toda velocidad hacia un desastre seguro.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: Un plan infalible
programme.desc: Un ingenioso trío de ladrones disfrazados debe luchar por sus vidas y el botín cuando un verdadero criminal maestro los chantajea para que planifiquen y ejecuten un atraco de $20 millones. Protagonizada por Ryan Reynolds.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Equilibrium
programme.desc: En el futuro, la humanidad ha prohibido cosas que producen emociones como la literatura, la música y el arte, para mantenerlo, un grupo especial de policías eliminará a los transgresores. Christian Bale protagoniza esta increíble película de acción.

programme.title: Contrarreloj
programme.desc: Un ex ladrón busca desesperadamente a su hija que ha sido secuestrada y encerrada en el maletero de un taxi. Protagonizada por Nicolas Cage y Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: El Smoking
programme.desc: Jimmy Tong es un taxista común transformado en chofer, que se tropieza con un traje de superespía de 2 mil millones de dólares, e inadvertidamente se convierte en un elegante agente secreto.

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Jay y el silencioso Bob
programme.desc: Hollywood adapta el cómic "Bluntman y Chronic" a la gran pantalla sin el permiso de los íconos drogadictos reales de DEPENDIENTES: Jay y Bob el Silencioso.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: El dictador
programme.desc: Los creadores y las estrellas de Borat traen esta asombrosa comedia sobre lo que pasa cuando el peor dictador del mundo llega a los Estados Unidos ¡Prepárate para llorar de risa con esta comedia delirante y bochornosamente divertida!

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: El dictador

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo, durante un viaje de fin de semana para obtener un trabajo que le ayudará a regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: Mama para rato
programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo, durante un viaje de fin de semana para obtener un trabajo que le ayudará a regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)
programme.desc: Benny has been deported from the United States back to a Mexico that is being ripped apart by warring drug cartels. He gets involved in the narco business and begins to rocket up through the ranks, and is surrounded by money, women, violence, and fun.

programme.title: Aventuras en juguetilandia
programme.desc: Juguetilandia está en peligro por el malvado Barnaby (Richard Mulligan) y solo puede salvarla Lisa (Drew Barrymore), una niña que no cree en los juguetes. También protagonizada por Eileen Brennan, Keanu Reeves y Pat Morita.

programme.title: Navidad epoca para amar
programme.desc: Una escritora de romances, famosa por sus obras ambientadas en navidad, queda varada por la nieve en Cranberry Falls, donde queda involucrada en un triángulo amoroso entre un amor de su niñez y el periodista que busca entrevistarla.

programme.title: Deseo navideño cumplido
programme.desc: Cuando Megan, de nueve años, dedica su deseo navideño a ayudar a su madre Cara a encontrar el amor, su carta termina volviéndose viral. ¿Cara seguirá el consejo de su hija y encontrará el amor?

programme.title: Mi dulce Navidad
programme.desc: La exitosa ejecutiva de marketing Sadie es hija de los dueños de una tienda de chocolate tradicional en un pequeño pueblo de Estados Unidos. Decide pasar la Navidad en su ciudad natal y descubre que sus padres planean vender la tienda.

programme.title: Christmas at Rosemont (LAS)
programme.desc: Atrapada en una tormenta de nieve cinco días antes de Navidad, Lisa, de 23 años de edad, y su nuevo amigo Brad, un snowboarder profesional, se refugian en The Rosemont.

programme.title: Navidad a la Carte
programme.desc: Cuando la periodista Carly tiene la oportunidad de participar en su propio programa, nada sale según lo planeado. La envían a Angel Heights para ayudar al chef Grant a reabrir su restaurante familial y filmarlo como piloto especial navideño de televisión.

programme.title: Navidad epoca para amar
programme.desc: Una escritora de romances, famosa por sus obras ambientadas en navidad, queda varada por la nieve en Cranberry Falls, donde queda involucrada en un triángulo amoroso entre un amor de su niñez y el periodista que busca entrevistarla.

programme.title: Leviatán, terror en la profundidad
programme.desc: En esta película de ciencia ficción, un equipo de exploración de aguas profundas descubre un barco de carga con un secreto mortal.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: La invitación
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller psicológico de Karyn Kusama, la tensión crece cuando Will asiste a la cena de su exesposa Eden y su nuevo marido, David.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: Fort Massacre
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: The Tin Star
programme.desc: Ben Owens, a greenhorn sheriff who hasn’t worn his badge long... and won’t live to wear it much longer unless he gets some savvy help.

programme.title: Sweet Smell of Success
programme.desc: A columnist and a press agent tear into the maelstrom of midtown Manhattan's night creatures in a sinister game that involves money, power and ultimately survival.

programme.title: Houdini
programme.desc: Tony Curtis gives a winning performance as the great Houdini, the struggling circus performer who emerged as the world’s most captivating magician and escape artist.

programme.title: Trapeze
programme.desc: Aerialist Burt Lancaster--who retired after suffering an injury--agrees to train aspiring trapeze artist Tony Curtis. But when both men fall in love with the beautiful and ambitious Gina Lollobrigida, the triangle threaten the dreams of them all.

programme.title: Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Charlton Heston stars as Brad Braden, the circus manager who lives and breathes to keep the show rolling. With the Big Top about to hit rock bottom, Braden hires The Great Sebastian, a daring trapeze legend, to revitalize the circus.

programme.title: The Killing
programme.desc: With fascinating detail, Stanley Kubrick lays bare the intricate inner-planning of a racetrack heist by a deadly mastermind (Sterling Hayden) and his crew. Co-stars Coleen Gray.

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night (1967)
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: The Patty Duke Show
programme.desc: Patty and Richard have decided to go steady. Their parents are not happy about this decision. They feel that 16-year old boys and girls should have as many contacts as possible and should not restrict their social life to one member of the opposite sex.

programme.title: The Patty Duke Show
programme.desc: Patty needs money to buy her mother a birthday present. It seems that Patty always needs money, and she usually comes up with fantastic schemes to raise it. This time she decides to become an astrologist, so she converts her bedroom into a reading room.

programme.title: The Patty Duke Show
programme.desc: The Lane household is invaded by spinster Aunt Pauline when she arrives for her annual visit. Much to everyone's dismay Aunt Pauline, expected to stay only for dinner, moves in with a bag and baggage and immediately takes over running the house.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve's cousin Selena comes to visit and is only too happy to help around the house. When everyone is grateful for her help, Bub thinks he is being replaced and decides to take a job at a movie theater.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike (Tim Considine) receives an invitation to a frat rush at the local college, then is eventually dropped because his college plans are perceived as being unclear.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob struggles to hide his flu symptoms at a family party rather than admit Laura was right to warn him about golfing in damp conditions.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Mel wants a magazine reporter to watch the writers at work, but Rob thinks they'll all end up performing for the reporter instead of getting anything done.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob is once again forced to thwart another scheme of his old but manipulative friend, Neil Schenk.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob receives a ransom demand of $2,500 for his lost television script.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: In an attempt to get rid of lady Dr. Craig, Uncles Joe flakes an illness that becomes real.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Granny's eatable gift might be the only thing to save the valley from losing their beloved train when Bedloe returns to Hooterville with a brand-new scheme to bring about the end of the Cannonball.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo decides to become an emancipated woman and leave Hooterville.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: To go to New York or not to go to New York--that is the question faced by Steve and Betty Jo after Steve gets a big job offer.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Plans for the annual Hotterville Founders' Day celebration are wrecked by generation-gap dissension.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe leads a delegation out to Washington, D.C., to save Sam Ducker's post office.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately. Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in "war games" against a rival unit and Pvt. Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry, Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is curious to learn about the book that Oliver (Eddie Albert) is reading. It is the real-life story of pioneers Gus and Etta Thompson. The episode flashes back to the 19th century with Oliver appearing as Gus and Lisa as Etta.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb (Tom Lester) seeks dating advice from the Douglas's after laying eyes on former classmate Betty Jo Bradley from petticoat Junction. Oliver's well-intentioned guidance has mixed results when Eb hilariously misconstrues the advice he's given.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The locals complain that Oliver's penchant for wearing business suits to do farm work is ruining Hooterville's image. Oliver tries to adjust, but the last laugh is on him when Lisa has her dressmaker design Italian him some swanky new overalls.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Hooterville Chamber of Commerce attempts to attract a Hollywood film studio to shoot a movie in town. And when a rumor spreads that a famous actor is arriving, the townsfolk are all abuzz as they prepare for their close-up, Mr. DeMille!

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A potential candidate for governor employs Interect to probe his background. He believes that if the detective agency can't find dirt on him, then his political opponents won't.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix reluctantly agrees to pursue a divorce case -- the woman involved is an old flame of his. The detective ends up being framed for murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young girl wants to `rent a detective' to prove her father, who is on Death Row, is innocent. Mannix takes the case in his own time and must solve it without Intertect's help.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's former girlfriend sees a man she met on vacation but he flees, so she asks Mannix to track him down. However, things take a turn when it turns out the man is an assassin.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A 15-year-old runaway girl comes to the apartment of the father she hasn't seen in years, only to find a man dead inside.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A dead cop's partner conceals the fact that the death resulted from his own mishandling of his job.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how earthquakes and faults have shaped human history by bringing both life and death.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor enters the virtual world of the Matrix hoping to track down the Master.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master makes his final bid to release the devastating power of the Time Lords.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela are on Fang Rock island where a murderous creature is at large.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: A thick fog surrounds Fang Rock as an alien menace stalks the island.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The survivors are in the lighthouse, but the Doctor is still worried about the creature.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The alien Rutan begins to pick off the remaining humans one by one.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the Doctor and Leela to a huge, mobile sand mine on an alien world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela are blamed for the murder of one of the sandminer's crew.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Taren Capel is using the robots to carry out the murders.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: As the robots close in, the Doctor and Leela join forces with the crew to fight back.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS flies into the Mandragora Helix, an alien energy in space.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor has made enemies of the Court Astrologer Hieronymous.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Torture and death await the Doctor as the Powers of Darkness envelop the Earth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions are trapped in the palace by members of the Cult of Demons.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana arrive on the war-torn planet of Atrios.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Marshal demands that the Doctor devise the ultimate deterrent against the Zeons.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: As the Marshal prepares to launch his attack, the Doctor meets the commander of Zeos.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With Mentalis on a countdown to destruction, the Doctor takes desperate measures.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana arrive in the lair of the Shadow, who also seeks the Key to Time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When an old mysterious book enters his life, everything changes for young Chris Parsons.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Salateen tells Peri and the Doctor they are dying from spectrox tomaemia.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's French bulldog goes crazy at the sight of other dogs; Cesar helps a former therapy dog with aggression issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake fires the La Mirage manager for withholding crucial information regarding the fire; Alexis offers a reward for the arrest and conviction of the arsonist; Michael Culhane continues to romance Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Dex's plan to free Caress from prison succeeds, as she returns to Denver with a fever for revenge; Sammy Jo is pregnant with Clay's baby and warns Steven no court would deny her custody of Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress vows retribution for her years of imprisonment; Michael Culhane uses Zach Powers to acquire thirty percent of "The Crater" project; Sammy Jo tells a distraught Clay of her pregnancy; Caress blackmails Emily Falimont.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A dying Emily begs Blake to use the letter she wrote to bring an end to Alexis and Ben's treachery; Clay and Sammy Jo are married, Nick Kimball relentlessly pursues Dominique's affections; Blake rejects Michael Culhane's efforts for a reconciliation.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Using Emily's letter, Blake devises a way to regain his empire; Sammy Jo learns she is not pregnant, but keeps it a secret from Clay; fearing Michael Culhane's deceitful intentions.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo fears she will lose Clay if he learns about her false pregnancy; Adam discovers the identity of the mysterious woman tormenting Ben; An explosion rips through an oil rig, trapping Blake amidst raging flames, as Ben leaves him to die.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids apartment after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: City Hell
programme.desc: Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Family of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Princess and the EVP
programme.desc: The final day has arrived –it's Grant's last investigation with TAPS. And where better to close out his phenomenal run but at Jason and Grant's very own haunted property, Spalding Inn, located in Whitefield, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Please Sign the Ghostbook
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS stays close to home and investigatesthe Lamda Chi Fraternity House at the University ofRhode Island, where a little girl reportedly fell to her death, and whose eerie presence is still feltin the house.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Serial Killer's Revenge
programme.desc: Jason and the TAPS team head to Charleston, South Carolina, one of the most haunted cities in America and winner of Ghost Hunters America's Hometown Ghost Hunt Contest.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Camp Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Jason and TAPS go to camp! They head to Camp Rutledge in Georgia where a woman has experienced paranormal activity since she was a teenager.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Massacre
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to New Orleans, Louisiana to investigate their first case without Grant: The Jimani Lounge Massacre.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
